rationale: The cited paper appears only once, as a parenthetical reference when defining the lifetime value of a customer (LVC) term in a profit-gain equation. The citing paper does not use the cited paper's customer-valuation model, data, assumptions, or findings in its churn prediction methodology or empirical tests. Its core contribution is about bagging/boosting classification performance, so this citation functions as background support for a generic metric definition rather than a meaningful intellectual dependency.
